title: 25W pure Class A guitar amplifier low-voltage audio board

requirements.text: Represent the isolated secondary-side low-voltage audio board for a 25W pure Class A solid-state guitar amplifier.
Include discrete input preamp, 3-band tone circuit, sweepable boost/cut filter, voltage driver, Class A output stage, speaker output, and low-voltage rail distribution.
Record thermal constraints for the output stage and require external heatsink review before build approval.

assumptions.text: Mains inlet, fuse, switch, protective earth bond, and transformer primary are not on this board.
assumptions.rationale: The hazardous mains power supply is a separate board and schematic.

assumptions.text: The low-voltage rail enters this board from an isolated transformer secondary and rectifier interface.
assumptions.rationale: The first acceptance milestone verifies only the isolated secondary-side schematic.

unresolved_decisions.question: Select final heatsink thermal resistance after enclosure and ambient-temperature targets are known.
Confirm final output transistor substitute policy against available manufacturer SPICE and safe operating area data.

notes: Mains supply and protective-earth decisions are handled by amp_mains_power_supply.
